title: RAG Product Description
scenario: Create a compelling product description for a Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) product. The product is a waterproof backpack designed for hikers and campers. The description should highlight the product's key features, benefits, and unique selling points. The output should be 50-70 words and in the tone of a marketing copy.
constraints: Must include the phrase 'waterproof and durable'

evaluationCriteria.description: The product description highlights the key features and benefits of the waterproof backpack.
The tone of the product description is marketing-oriented and engaging.
The product description meets the word count and phrase requirements.
